headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 25
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 25, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Today's session told a bifurcated story: equities found genuine momentum in cyclical and technology sectors while crypto endured another day of meaningful outflows and altcoin selling, underscoring a selective rather than broad risk appetite. The divergence between equity strength and digital asset weakness is the defining tension heading into tomorrow. Watch whether crypto stabilizes and rejoins the risk-on trade, or whether the outflow trend deepens and begins to weigh on overall sentiment. CLOSING PRICES SPY +0.1% | QQQ +0.4% | VIX +1.4% | TLT +1.3% | DXY -0.2% | OIL +1.6% vs MORNING SPY +1.6% | QQQ +4.1% | VIX +5.8% | TLT -0.2% | DXY -0.3% | OIL +6.8% EVENING NEWS ▲ Kazakhstan’s stock exchange launches Solana ETF for regulated SOL exposure in Central Asia ▲ Pau Cubarsí praises Anthony Gordon’s signing for FC Barcelona ▲ Canadian Stocks Advance Amid Fresh Tensions In Gulf, U.S. Inflation Data Release ▼ Bitcoin’s fall to $60K changes things, but what does the data say? ▲ Fed's monetary stance is 'well positioned' to restore inflation to 2%, NY Fed's Williams says SCENARIO SHIFTS ↑ Late Cycle · ↑ Recession · ↓↓ Goldilocks · ↑ Stagflation · ↑ Hegemony · ↑ Displacement REGIME CHECK Risk Gauge: 97.3/100 (Critical). Phase: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: XLI +3.4%, XBI +3.1%, SMH +2.4%, URA -3.6%, COPX -3.8%. Sector dispersion: 72 (EXTREME, breadth SELECTIVE_STRENGTH), 56% positive 1w.
